mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shop_item WHERE status = 1 AND stock > 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_item SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND stock > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_item (name, description, image_url, required_points, stock, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{image_url}, #{required_points}, #{stock}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM shop_item
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
